title: Oil prices fall on hopes of U.S.-Iran deal despite Tehran pushback
summary: Oil prices declined Friday following U.S. President Trump's announcement of a framework agreement with Iran, signaling potential easing of Middle East tensions despite Iranian resistance.
content: Oil prices fell on Friday after U.S. President Donald Trump said Washington had reached a framework agreement with Iran, raising hopes that tensions in the Middle East could ease.

zh.title: 伊朗协议希望推动油价下跌，尽管伊朗反对
zh.summary: 美国总统特朗普宣布与伊朗达成框架协议，油价周五下跌，表明中东紧张局势可能缓解，尽管伊朗提出反对。

title: Stock futures tick higher as Wall Street gears up for SpaceX’s historic IPO: Live updates
summary: Stock futures are rising ahead of SpaceX's debut on Nasdaq Friday, marking the largest IPO in history for Elon Musk's rocket company.
content: Elon Musk's rocket maker is set to debut on the Nasdaq on Friday in what will be the largest IPO in history.

zh.title: 华尔街为SpaceX历史性IPO做准备，股指期货上涨
zh.summary: SpaceX周五在纳斯达克上市，股指期货随之上升，这是埃隆·马斯克火箭公司历史上规模最大的IPO。

title: Pirro's losses in Fed investigation should stay on the books, judge rules
summary: Judge James Boasberg denied U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro's request to vacate earlier orders in a Federal investigation, ruling her losses must remain on record.
content: In a scathing ruling, Judge James Boasberg denied U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia Jeanine Pirro's request to vacate his earlier orders.

zh.title: 法官裁决：皮罗在联邦调查中的损失应保留在案卷中
zh.summary: 法官詹姆斯·博斯伯格驳回了美国律师珍妮·皮罗撤销联邦调查中早期命令的请求，裁定她的损失必须保留在案卷中。

title: I’m 55 and earn $100,000. Should I take a $2,900 monthly pension — or $2,200 with 3% annual hikes?
summary: A 55-year-old earning $100,000 annually seeks guidance on choosing between a $2,900 monthly pension or a $2,200 option with 3% annual increases, planning to work until age 60.
content: “I plan to continue working until age 60.”

zh.title: 我55岁，年收入10万美元。我应该选择每月2900美元的养老金——还是选择每年增加3%的2200美元方案？
zh.summary: 一位年收入10万美元的55岁员工寻求指导，在选择每月2900美元的养老金或2200美元（每年增加3%）的方案之间做出选择，计划工作到60岁。
